narrative:
Rockford Village (precinct in Mercer County) has 711 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.7 percentage points.
